note: seq=111: (1) BACKUP PROVABLE -- atlas_backup_status publishes backup.json (last backup, size, restore-test result, retention) from the local last_backup.json, AND probes off-box DR (ssh key to InterServer 64.20.50.3 -> reachable y/n). Hourly. (2) DAILY EXECUTIVE DIGEST -- atlas_digest publishes digest.json (business_total+delta, rates, sources, prospects/qualified, engine+ops-advisor+frontier actions/recs, escalations), daily. (3) watcher KEY_UNITS widened to 23 (incl atlas-backup/backup-status/digest) -> all registered+supervised. Both scripts verified complete (__main__, compile). Honest: oneshot timers self-retry via timer (Restart=on-failure is for long-running services).

steps.note: seq=111: backup-status (provable+offbox probe) + daily digest + watcher registers all 23.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_backup_status.py':'6c81a21d12957857afd5f1c5b4a83bef4344b93252c0c749ff67b710e83a9d87','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_digest.py':'1133676f7ec81931df10827f1707cffd256fd2bea48c8fa0f354dd740e0029ef','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_watcher.py':'cfa19b28e32885f4cf92c742498c2e7c3ecf9093d6c2950161678a1e811c7ff1'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('shas ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backup status publisher
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_backup_status.py
TimeoutStartSec=60

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backup status hourly

[Timer]
OnBootSec=7min
OnUnitActiveSec=1h
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS daily executive digest
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_digest.py
TimeoutStartSec=60

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS daily digest

[Timer]
OnBootSec=9min
OnCalendar=*-*-* 07:00:00
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS standalone watcher (smart health + self-heal; heartbeat for the watchdog)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=5
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=WATCH_KEY_UNITS=atlas-autopull.timer,postgresql.service,atlas-gleif.timer,atlas-irs990.timer,atlas-nrd.timer,atlas-edgar.timer,atlas-signal-fusion.timer,atlas-source-discovery.timer,atlas-backfill.timer,atlas-reenrich-ladder.timer,atlas-rate-bridge.timer,atlas-hunter-stats.timer,atlas-watcher.timer,atlas-watchdog.timer,atlas-batch-canary.timer,atlas-ops-advisor.timer,brain-improve-hourly.timer,brain-improve-daily.timer,atlas-improve-publish.timer,atlas-signal-sync.timer,atlas-backup.timer,atlas-backup-status.timer,atlas-digest.timer
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_watcher.py
TimeoutStartSec=60
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=20

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); [ (s.run(['systemctl','enable',u]), s.run(['systemctl','start',u])) for u in ['atlas-backup-status.timer','atlas-digest.timer'] ]; [ s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block',v]) for v in ['atlas-backup-status.service','atlas-digest.service'] ]; s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-watcher.timer']); print('backup-status + digest live; watcher registers all 23')"
